title: WagYourMinimap
description: Minimap and Worldmap. Track and view your world.
body:
# WagYourMinimap

This mod is a minimap mod, including mob radar, with an API allowing developers to create plugins for it. It supports both a "vanilla" color scheme based on the material colors (as the in-game map item works), as well as more acurate colors based on the average of the current texture pack.

![Screenshot of minimap with waypoints](http://jsmacros.wagyourtail.xyz/wymm2.png "Screenshot 1")

![Screenshot of fullscreen map with waypoints](http://jsmacros.wagyourtail.xyz/wymm3.png "Screenshot 2")
